# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "2.1"
consumers:
  - username: "service-user-1"
    custom_id: "service-user-1-id"
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_names:
            - "apikey"
          run_on_preflight: true
  - username: "service-user-2"
    custom_id: "service-user-2-id"
    plugins:
      - name: "key-auth"
        config:
          key_in_body: false
          key_in_header: true
          key_in_query: false
          key_names:
            - "apikey"
          run_on_preflight: true

upstreams:
  - name: "user-service"
    host_header: "user-service"
    scheme: "http"
    retries: 5
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 1
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: "user-service:8080"
        weight: 100
      - target: "user-service-2:8080"
        weight: 100

  - name: "order-service"
    host_header: "order-service"
    scheme: "http"
    retries: 5
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 1
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: "order-service:8080"
        weight: 100
      - target: "order-service-2:8080"
        weight: 100

  - name: "payment-service"
    host_header: "payment-service"
    scheme: "http"
    retries: 5
    slots: 100
    healthchecks:
      active:
        concurrency: 10
        http_path: "/health"
        timeout: 1
        healthy:
          interval: 10
          successes: 1
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          timeouts: 3
          http_failures: 3
    targets:
      - target: "payment-service:8080"
        weight: 100
      - target: "payment-service-2:8080"
        weight: 100

routes:
  - name: "user-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/users/*"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    upstream:
      name: "user-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: "local"
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_verification:
            jwks_uri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
            jwks_cache_ttl: 3600
          secret_is_base64: false
          anonymous: false
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
            - "X-Requested-With"
          exposed_headers:
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Origin"
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Methods"
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Headers"
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: true
          preflight_continue: false

  - name: "order-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/orders/*"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    upstream:
      name: "order-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          minute: 500
          policy: "local"
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_verification:
            jwks_uri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
            jwks_cache_ttl: 3600
          secret_is_base64: false
          anonymous: false
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
            - "X-Requested-With"
          exposed_headers:
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Origin"
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Methods"
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Headers"
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: true
          preflight_continue: false

  - name: "payment-service-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/payments/*"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    upstream:
      name: "payment-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "rate-limiting"
        config:
          minute: 200
          policy: "local"
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: "jwt"
        config:
          claim_verification:
            jwks_uri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
            jwks_cache_ttl: 3600
          secret_is_base64: false
          anonymous: false
          run_on_preflight: true
      - name: "cors"
        config:
          origins:
            - "*"
          methods:
            - "GET"
            - "POST"
            - "PUT"
            - "DELETE"
            - "OPTIONS"
          headers:
            - "Content-Type"
            - "Authorization"
            - "X-Requested-With"
          exposed_headers:
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Origin"
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Methods"
            - "Access-Control-Allow-Headers"
          max_age: 3600
          credentials: true
          preflight_continue: false

  - name: "health-check-route"
    hosts:
      - "api.example.com"
    paths:
      - "/health"
    strip_path: true
    preserve_host: false
    protocols:
      - "http"
      - "https"
    upstream:
      name: "health-service"
    plugins:
      - name: "response-ratelimiting"
        config:
          minute: 1000
          policy: "local"
          hide_client_headers: false
